article_title: Bylaw 14753 — Housing Agreement (4612, 4664 Lougheed Highway and 2040, 2140 and 2150 Alpha Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby Locks In Affordable Rental Units at Brentwood Development via Housing Agreement
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council passed Bylaw 14753, which lets the City sign a legally binding housing agreement with Brentwood BT Development Limited. The agreement requires the developer to include a set number of non-market rental units (below-market-rate apartments reserved for lower-income households) in their large mixed-use project at Lougheed Highway and Alpha Avenue — and registers that requirement on the property title so it stays in place permanently.
